variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected COGS rows or not separately disclosed, so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/overhead appears in the operating section above financial lines. Research and Development Expense is separately selected for XRD, but there is no explicit amortization/depreciation in R&D row to add. Therefore nothing should be added separately.
